design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title+kind+audience+generated_at produced architecture=workflow-command-center, typography=Satoshi, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], GSAP=[card-stacking, scrubbed-word-reveal]. AIDA Check: Hero=Attention, Proof=Interest, Motion chapter=Desire, CTA band=Action. Font Selection: Satoshi (allowed). Hero Math Verification: H1 clamp ensures 2–3 lines at common breakpoints. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded CDN usage. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, high-contrast secondary CTA verified.
headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page and field guide for creators and coaches who want to turn live conversations into durable content and repeatable operations using personal AI agents with real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache.
